turns.content:
<objective>Investigate 3 flaw domains in hivemind-plugin-private project. Read flaw elaboration first, then read source files, reproduce each flaw, document observed behavior. NO conclusions, NO opinions, NO fix suggestions. Only facts: reproduction steps, observed behavior, file:line references.</objective>

**Summary:** tmux-copilot permission gate broken + no child session backchannel + agent looping from child emissions

<files_to_read>
Required reading order:
1. .hivemind/planning/tools-audit-58-9-2026-06-05/03-flaw-elaboration.md (full)
2. .hivemind/planning/tools-audit-58-9-2026-06-05/02-schema-overlap-audit.md (full)
3. src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts (full)
4. src/coordination/delegation/coordinator.ts (lines 192-312, 390-470, 630-723)
5. src/tools/delegation/delegation-status.ts (lines 1-50, 130-145, 640-680)
6. src/coordination/completion/notification-handler.ts (full)
7. src/coordination/delegation/notification-router.ts (full)
8. src/coordination/delegation/periodic-notification.ts (full)
</files_to_read>

<symptoms>
Domain A - tmux-copilot Permission:
- ORCHESTRATOR_AGENTS hardcoded to 4 agents (tmux-copilot.ts:59-64)
- peek/take-over/send-keys/forward-prompt all blocked for non-orchestrator agents
- list-panes NOT in USER_SESSION_ALLOWED_ACTIONS
- peek requires paneId but parent has sessionId
- Result: copilot features unusable for most agents

Domain B - Backchannel:
- WaiterModel: dispatch → wait → result. No interim read.
- forward-prompt sends keystrokes to tmux pane, NOT structured prompt to child session
- No session.prompt from parent to running child
- 60s timeout too short for research tasks
- delegation-status returns only opaque counts (toolCallCount, messageCount), not content

Domain C - Agent Looping:
- notifyDelegationTerminal calls sendPromptAsync(parentSessionId, { noReply: true, text: notification }) 
- This injects <system_reminder> into parent context
- reactivateSessionStream sends empty prompt to reactivate stopped parent stream
- notification-router.route() calls notifyDelegationTerminal OR notifyParentSession
- PeriodicNotifier may keep emitting even after child completes
- After child completes, parent receives notification → responds → creates new turn → sees same context → same response
- Tool output unchanged between turns → same response generated repeatedly
- No repetition detection anywhere
</symptoms>

<mode>
symptoms_prefilled: true
goal: find_root_cause_only
</mode>

<output_requirements>
For each domain:
1. Reproduce the flaw (exact steps, code path)
2. Observed behavior only (no conclusions, no fix suggestions)
3. File:line references for every code path involved
4. What emits to parent, when, and why parent doesn't stop

Write debug file to: .hivemind/planning/tools-audit-58-9-2026-06-05/04-debug-root-cause.md
</output_requirements>

<critical_rules>
- NO conclusions
- NO opinions
- NO fix suggestions
- NO recommendations
- ONLY: reproduction steps, observed behavior, file:line evidence
- If behavior contradicts documentation, state the contradiction factually
</critical_rules>
